# Loading files and searching for the hadith.
import json, re, os, math, sys

# File paths as given in system messages
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"

# Load files
with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran = json.load(f)
with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadiths = json.load(f)

# Inspect structure sizes
len_q = len(quran) if isinstance(quran, list) else "not list"
len_h = len(hadiths) if isinstance(hadiths, list) else "not list"
len_q, len_h

# Response_Context from user message
response_context = """بالتأكيد، الإجابة على السؤال هي: الإيمان بالله والتوكل عليه.
قال الله تعالى: {وَأَشْرَكُوا لِمُسْلِمٍ وَلَمْ يَكُ مُشْرِكًا} [الأنعام: 140]. 
ومما يؤكد ذلك قوله تعالى: {وَلَقَدْ أَرَکنا فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَخْذولًا فَأَخَذَ عَلَيْهِ عَقدًا أَن لَا يُؤْتِيَ إِلَى اللَّهِ عَقدًا} [غافر: 36].
وقال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "لا تَزالُ طَاعةُ مُؤْمِنٍ مُؤْمِناً طَاعةً وَلَوْ أَمرَهُ بِالْإِجْحَاضِ" (رواه البخاري).
أما التوكل عليه، فقال الله تعالى: {وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ بَالِغُ أَمْرِهِ قَدْ جَعَلَ اللَّهُ لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدْرًا} [الطارق: 3-4].
وقال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "لا تَزالُ طَاعةُ مُؤْمِنٍ مُؤْمِناً طَاعةً وَلَوْ أَمَرَهُ بِالْإِجْحَاضِ" (رواه البخاري).
وأما الشجاعة، فقال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "لا يَزالُ الإِنسانُ مُستَصِباً إِلَيكَ حَتّى يُكْمِلَ إِلى رَحْمَتِكَ فَلا تَخَف مُؤمِناً" (رواه البخاري).
وقال الله تعالى: {وَلَا تَخَافُوْا وَأُولَئِكَ هُمُ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ} [آل عمران: 156].
وأما العزيمة، فقال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "لا تَزالُ الإِنسانُ يُحِبُّ أَن يَكُونَ عَزَizaً وَيُكْرَهُ أَن يَكُونَ ضَعيفاً" (رواه مسلم).
وقال الله تعالى: {وَمَن يُؤْمِن بِاللَّهِ يَهْدِ قَلبَهُ} [الأنعام: 125].
فالإيمان بالله والتوكل عليه هو أفضل الوسائل لاكتساب العزيمة والشجاعة في الإقدام على أي عمل، خاصةً العمل الذي به صعوبة ومشقة."""

span_start = 321
span_end = 393
full_substring = response_context[span_start:span_end]
span_start, span_end, full_substring, len(response_context)

# Build normalization function
import unicodedata

# Arabic diacritics pattern
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED\u0670]')

def normalize_arabic(s):
    s = s or ""
    # Remove diacritics
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub("", s)
    # Remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('\u0640', '')
    # Map hamzas and alifs and other normalizations
    trans_map = {
        'أ':'ا', 'إ':'ا', 'آ':'ا', 'ٱ':'ا',
        'ؤ':'و', 'ئ':'ي', 'ء':'ء', 'ى':'ي',
        'ۃ':'ه', 'ة':'ه'
    }
    for k,v in trans_map.items():
        s = s.replace(k,v)
    # Remove punctuation (both Arabic and ASCII)
    # Keep Arabic letters, Arabic numerals, ASCII letters and digits and spaces
    # We'll replace punctuation with space to preserve token boundaries
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0621-\u064A0-9A-Za-z\s]', ' ', s)
    # Collapse spaces and strip
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    # Lowercase ascii if any (not needed)
    s = s.lower()
    return s

# LCS normalized
def lcs_length(a, b):
    # compute LCS length using dynamic programming; for strings not tokens
    m, n = len(a), len(b)
    # If too long, fallback to approximate approach using difflib
    if m*n > 3_000_000:  # prevent huge matrix
        import difflib
        seq = difflib.SequenceMatcher(a=a, b=b)
        # get matching blocks sum of sizes
        return sum(triple.size for triple in seq.get_matching_blocks())
    dp = [[0]*(n+1) for _ in range(m+1)]
    for i in range(m-1, -1, -1):
        for j in range(n-1, -1, -1):
            if a[i]==b[j]:
                dp[i][j] = dp[i+1][j+1] + 1
            else:
                dp[i][j] = max(dp[i+1][j], dp[i][j+1])
    return dp[0][0]

def normalized_lcs_ratio(a, b):
    a_n = normalize_arabic(a)
    b_n = normalize_arabic(b)
    if len(a_n)==0 or len(b_n)==0:
        return 0.0
    lcs = lcs_length(a_n, b_n)
    # normalize by max length
    denom = max(len(a_n), len(b_n))
    return lcs/denom, a_n, b_n, lcs, denom

def token_f1(a, b):
    a_tokens = normalize_arabic(a).split()
    b_tokens = normalize_arabic(b).split()
    if not a_tokens or not b_tokens:
        return 0.0
    common = 0
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(a_tokens)
    cb = Counter(b_tokens)
    for tok in ca:
        common += min(ca[tok], cb.get(tok,0))
    if common==0:
        return 0.0
    precision = common / len(a_tokens)
    recall = common / len(b_tokens)
    if precision+recall==0:
        return 0.0
    return 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)

# Test normalization on the full substring
full_substring = full_substring.strip()
print("Original:", full_substring)
print("Normalized:", normalize_arabic(full_substring))

# Search hadiths for best matches
target_full = full_substring
target_snippet = "لا تَزالُ ...ْإِجْحَاضِ"  # provided snippet truncated with ellipsis
# But user-provided snippet included "لا تَزالُ ...ْإِجْحَاضِ"
# Useful to normalize that by removing ellipsis
target_snippet_clean = target_snippet.replace("...", "").replace("…","").strip()

best = []
for idx, h in enumerate(hadiths):
    # get candidate matn; prefer Matn field if present and non-empty; otherwise use hadithTxt
    candidate = None
    if h.get('Matn') and isinstance(h.get('Matn'), str) and h.get('Matn').strip():
        candidate = h.get('Matn').strip()
    elif h.get('hadithTxt') and isinstance(h.get('hadithTxt'), str) and h.get('hadithTxt').strip():
        candidate = h.get('hadithTxt').strip()
    else:
        continue
    
    # compute normalized lcs ratio with FULL substring
    ratio, a_n, b_n, lcs, denom = normalized_lcs_ratio(candidate, target_full)
    f1 = token_f1(candidate, target_full)
    # Also compute with snippet cleaned
    ratio_sn, *_ = normalized_lcs_ratio(candidate, target_snippet_clean)
    f1_sn = token_f1(candidate, target_snippet_clean)
    # store some top matches
    best.append((ratio, f1, ratio_sn, f1_sn, idx, h.get('hadithID'), candidate))

# sort by ratio desc
best_sorted = sorted(best, key=lambda x: (x[0], x[1]), reverse=True)
# show top 10
top10 = best_sorted[:20]
len(top10), top10[:10]

# Search for hadith entries that contain both 'طاعة' and 'مؤمن' near each other
candidates = []
for idx, h in enumerate(hadiths):
    for field in ('Matn','hadithTxt'):
        text = h.get(field) or ''
        if 'طاعة' in text and 'مؤمن' in text:
            # check proximity: index difference small
            pos_t = text.find('طاعة')
            pos_m = text.find('مؤمن')
            if pos_t!=-1 and pos_m!=-1 and abs(pos_t-pos_m) < 40: # within 40 chars
                candidates.append((idx, h.get('hadithID'), field, text[:200]))
len(candidates), candidates[:20]

# Search Quran for best similarity
best_q = []
for i, v in enumerate(quran):
    text = v.get('ayah_text') or ''
    ratio, *_ = normalized_lcs_ratio(text, target_full)
    f1 = token_f1(text, target_full)
    best_q.append((ratio, f1, i, v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id'], text))
best_q_sorted = sorted(best_q, key=lambda x:(x[0], x[1]), reverse=True)
best_q_sorted[:10]

# get best match overall from hadiths
best_overall = max(best_sorted, key=lambda x: (x[0], x[1]))
best_overall
